sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: (PLPC) Risk Channels and Responsive Allocation
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily discusses Preformed Line Products Company (PLPC), noting weak near-term sentiment but strong mid and long-term outlooks, with an exceptional 34.3:1 risk-reward setup. It outlines three AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—tailored for different risk profiles and holding periods, based on multi-timeframe signal analysis. The piece also highlights the availability of real-time signals, API integration, and custom risk models for institutional-grade analysis.

feed.title: CPI Card Group Inc. (PMTS) Lags Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: CPI Card Group Inc. (PMTS) reported its second-quarter earnings, missing both Zacks Consensus Estimates for earnings and revenue. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $0.09, which was 55% lower than the consensus estimate of $0.20, and revenues of $105.7 million, falling short of the $110.8 million estimate. This marks the first time in the last four quarters the company has missed earnings estimates.

feed.title: Looking for work? PG&E is hiring for 2 Diablo Canyon outages
feed.summary: PG&E is hosting an Outage Hiring Information Fair on Thursday, April 2, at Embassy Suites in San Luis Obispo, seeking to fill positions for two upcoming refueling outages at the Diablo Canyon Power Plant in fall 2026 and spring 2027. The fair will cover outage jobs, full-time PG&E positions, veterans' programs, and opportunities with business partners, encouraging attendees to bring their resumes. Diablo Canyon is California's largest source of clean energy, and temporary staff are crucial during these maintenance periods.

feed.title: Outlook Therapeutics (OTLK) Price Target Increased by 11.90% to 9.59
feed.summary: Outlook Therapeutics (OTLK) has seen its price target increased by 11.90% to 9.59. This adjustment reflects a more optimistic outlook for the company's financial prospects and stock valuation. Investors and market watchers should note this revised target as it could influence future trading decisions.

feed.title: International Business Machines, ETH Zurich Enter 10-Year Partnership for AI, Quantum Computing Algorithms
feed.summary: IBM and ETH Zurich have announced a 10-year partnership focused on advancing artificial intelligence and quantum computing algorithms. This collaboration aims to drive innovation and research in these transformative technologies, leveraging the expertise of both institutions. The partnership signifies a long-term commitment to exploring the potential of AI and quantum computing for scientific and industrial applications.

feed.title: Wall Street Turns Bullish on Sempra Energy: Wells Fargo Sets $115 Price Target
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has upgraded Sempra (SRE) to "Overweight" with a $115 price target, adding it to their Q2 Tactical Ideas List. The upgrade is driven by Sempra's simplification efforts, regulatory clarity, and upcoming catalysts like a KKR partnership and Ecogas sale, which are expected to re-rate the stock above its current $98 level. These strategic moves are projected to redirect capital towards regulated utility operations and support a 7%-9% long-term EPS growth, making the stock's current 17x forward P/E appear undervalued compared to its earning potential and rising dividend.

feed.title: KEPCO and PVN Partner to Build Vietnam Nuclear Supply Chain
feed.summary: KEPCO and PetroVietnam (PVN) have formed a partnership to develop a local nuclear power plant supply chain in Vietnam. KEPCO shared South Korea's extensive experience and know-how in nuclear power plant design, construction, operation, and maintenance, proposing a tailored cooperation roadmap. Discussions focused on local company participation, professional human resource development, and phased supply chain establishment for the Ninh Thuan-2 nuclear power plant project.

feed.title: Intel strikes $14bn deal with Apollo to reclaim Irish chip plant
authors: Tim Bradshaw in London and Antoine Gara and Eric Platt in New York
feed.summary: Intel has announced a $14 billion deal to buy back full ownership of its Fab 34 semiconductor plant in Ireland from Apollo. This move comes just two years after Intel sold a stake in the facility to shore up its finances. The chipmaker's improved financial position and strategic growth, partly due to increasing demand for its CPUs in AI workloads and significant investments, enabled this reclamation.

feed.title: Patrick Industries Stock: A Key Player in North America's RV and Marine Supply Chain Amid Sector Rec
feed.summary: Patrick Industries (PATK) is a key supplier of components to the RV, marine, and housing markets in North America, with its core business model relying on value-added distribution and manufacturing. The company is strategically expanding through acquisitions and technological investments, positioning itself for growth amid stabilizing interest rates and rising disposable incomes. While benefiting from diversified end-markets and a strong market position, it faces risks from cyclical downturns, commodity inflation, and supply chain disruptions.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) Price Target Lowered to $19.00 at Wolfe Research
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has lowered its price target for Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) to $19.00 from $21.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating, suggesting a roughly 19% upside. This adjustment comes as HBAN missed recent quarterly earnings expectations, reporting $0.37 EPS against a $0.40 consensus and $1.61 billion in revenue against $2.21 billion. Despite the lowered target, the analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $20.43.

feed.title: Truist raises Bank of New York Mellon stock price target on NII growth
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE:BK) shares to $140 from $136, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment is driven by higher net interest income on an expanded balance sheet, despite some offset from softer fee revenue and elevated expenses. Truist also raised its EPS estimates for 2026 and 2027 and noted that InvestingPro data suggests the company is undervalued, with three analysts recently revising earnings upwards.

feed.title: Evercore ISI reiterates In Line rating on AT&T stock at $28
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has reiterated an "In Line" rating for AT&T (NYSE:T) with a $28 price target, following the launch of its new OneConnect service. This service bundles fiber broadband and wireless into a single subscription, targeting price-conscious households. While it could dilute ARPU, Evercore ISI believes it may lead to service-revenue growth and lower churn rates by appealing to a broader customer base and simplifying billing.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp Stock (XOM) Moved Down by 3.53% on Apr 1: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp (XOM) shares fell by 3.53% on April 1st, driven by a shift in market sentiment regarding global oil supplies. Hopes for a de-escalation of the Iran conflict, including potential statements from President Trump and reports of Iran seeking a ceasefire, led to a decline in crude oil prices and subsequently impacted energy stocks. This unwound a "geopolitical risk premium" that had previously supported oil prices, despite ExxonMobil's strong fundamentals and diversified operations.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton to Acquire Cryptocurrency Firm 250 Digital
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton is set to acquire 250 Digital, a cryptocurrency investment management firm, integrating its team and strategies to expand Franklin Templeton's presence in the digital assets sector. This acquisition will form the new Franklin Crypto unit, led by Christopher Perkins and Seth Ginns, aiming to leverage crypto expertise and Franklin Templeton's global network for institutional growth. The deal, expected to close in Q2 2026, will also involve BENJI tokens as part of the payment, highlighting a move towards blockchain-based M&A.

feed.title: IVZ: Morgan Stanley Lowers Price Target to $26.00, Maintains Equ
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Michael Cyprys has lowered the price target for Invesco (IVZ) from $28.00 to $26.00, while maintaining an 'Equal-Weight' rating. This adjustment reflects a -7.14% change. Invesco manages $2.154 trillion in assets, primarily for retail clients, with significant operations in equity, fixed-income, and alternative investments globally. The average analyst price target for IVZ is $30.94, suggesting a 27.40% upside from its current price, though GuruFocus estimates a downside of 37.26%.

feed.title: Teledyne eXtreamer for Seismic Data Receives 2026 Spotlight on New Technology Award
feed.summary: Teledyne Geophysical Instruments' eXtreamer, an advanced small form factor seismic streamer, has been honored with a 2026 Spotlight on New Technology Award from the Offshore Technology Conference (OTC). This recognition highlights eXtreamer's innovation, uniqueness, and commercial value for the offshore energy industry. Developed with Geometrics Inc., the system addresses the demand for ultra-high-resolution marine seismic data acquisition, offering a robust, flexible, and scalable solution for challenging environments.

feed.title: Pinnacle is America’s No. 12 Best Company to Work For
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners has been ranked No. 12 on Fortune's 2026 list of the "100 Best Companies to Work For," marking its tenth consecutive year on the prestigious list. This recognition highlights Pinnacle's strong people-first culture, supported by 97% of its team members who consider it a great place to work. The firm's consistent appearance on this list underscores its commitment to employee satisfaction and leadership in creating a high-trust work environment.

feed.title: Mark Kidd sells 18,000 shares (IRM) across Q1 2026 — Form 144
feed.summary: Mark Kidd, an insider at Iron Mountain Inc. (IRM), sold a total of 18,000 shares across three separate transactions in the first quarter of 2026, as reported in a Form 144 SEC filing. The sales amounted to over $1.79 million and are considered routine insider dispositions. The filing also noted past restricted stock vesting for Kidd.

feed.title: Microsoft Fell 6% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Microsoft stock fell 6% over the last 30 days due to investor concerns about the timing of returns from significant AI investments amidst rising infrastructure costs. Despite this, a valuation model suggests the stock is undervalued, with a target price of $607, implying 64% upside over 2.2 years, driven by strong Azure growth and enterprise adoption of AI tools. Institutional activity shows mixed but largely constructive interest, with major firms increasing their positions.

feed.title: Janux Unveils Development Candidate in Bristol Myers Squibb Partnership, Worth $35M Milestone
feed.summary: Janux Therapeutics has nominated a development candidate in its collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS), triggering a $35 million milestone payment. The candidate is a tumor-activated therapeutic targeting an undisclosed solid tumor antigen, identified using Janux’s TRACTr platform. Janux will handle preclinical development and IND submission, with BMS taking over clinical development and commercialization, while Janux remains eligible for up to $800 million in further milestone payments and tiered royalties.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton to acquire CoinFund spinoff to expand crypto push
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton is set to acquire 250 Digital, a cryptocurrency investment unit spun out of venture firm CoinFund, boosting its digital asset expansion efforts. The new entity will be renamed Franklin Crypto and led by Christopher Perkins, with Seth Ginns as CIO. This move aligns with traditional financial firms increasing their involvement in cryptocurrencies, supported by current favorable policies.

feed.title: Emerson Electric Stock Rises After Jefferies Upgrade to Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies upgraded Emerson Electric (EMR) stock from Hold to Buy, raising its price target to $175, citing strong order momentum in core markets that is expected to drive earnings growth. The upgrade follows Emerson's solid Q1 2026 earnings beat, with underlying orders up 9% year-over-year and particularly strong growth in North America. Despite some softness in China and Europe, the company is well-positioned due to AI infrastructure, energy security, and nearshoring trends, making its stock appear undervalued.

feed.title: Disney shares are trading at a discount. Raymond James says it's time to buy
feed.summary: Raymond James has upgraded Disney to outperform from market perform, setting a $115 price target, believing the stock is trading at an attractive valuation despite macro fears and expected theme park attendance headwinds. The firm anticipates benefits from new cruise ships, a Disneyland Paris expansion, and growth in Disney's streaming business, which could offset park-related challenges. Most analysts on Wall Street also have a positive outlook on Disney stock.

feed.title: Omnicom CEO John Wren earned $70m package in 2025
feed.summary: Omnicom CEO John Wren received a nearly $70 million pay package in 2025, primarily through stock options, as part of a new incentive structure designed to align his compensation directly with Omnicom's stock performance. Wren reduced his salary to $1, receiving options allowing him to profit only if the company's share price rises above $77.60. This move followed the $9 billion acquisition of Interpublic and aims to ensure Wren's continued leadership during a period of significant transformation for the agency group.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Howmet Aerospace Price Target to $271 From $283, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) to $271 from $283, while reiterating its Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a change in the financial outlook by the analyst, maintaining a positive sentiment towards the aerospace component manufacturer despite the slight reduction in target price. The article does not provide specific reasons for the price target adjustment.

feed.title: RTX unit's new tool tests hidden networks before lives are at risk
feed.summary: RTX BBN Technologies, a unit of RTX (NYSE: RTX), has released Maude-HCS, an open-source toolkit for modeling, testing, and validating covert communication networks. Funded by DARPA, this tool significantly reduces validation time from weeks to hours with a low error rate of 1%-9%. Maude-HCS aims to strengthen U.S. cyber defense by ensuring the effectiveness and undetectability of critical hidden communication systems used in national security and contested environments.

feed.title: Hitting a buried power or gas line? Dominion says call 811 first
feed.summary: Dominion Energy is urging its Virginia and North Carolina customers to call 811, the "Call Before You Dig" hotline, before starting any outdoor digging projects this spring. This reminder coincides with National Safe Digging Month in April and aims to prevent accidental strikes on underground utility lines, which can lead to service disruptions, fines, property damage, or serious injury. Virginia and North Carolina law requires contacting 811 at least three business days before any excavation work.

feed.title: United Airlines posts Q1 results Apr. 21, webcast follows Apr. 22
feed.summary: United Airlines (NYSE: UAL) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The company will then host a live, listen-only webcast conference call to discuss these results and outlook on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. CT / 10:30 a.m. ET. The webcast will be accessible through the investor relations section of United's website, ir.united.com.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Textron to $99 From $97, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Textron (TXT) shares to $99, an increase from the previous target of $97. The firm has decided to maintain a "Neutral" rating on the stock. This update reflects Citigroup's latest assessment of Textron's valuation and outlook.

feed.title: Omnicom launches Adobe practice, integrates LeapPoint By Investing.com
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. announced the launch of a new Adobe practice through its transformation consultancy, Credera, integrating its 2024 acquisition, LeapPoint. This move expands Omnicom's digital transformation capabilities and aims to help clients maximize their Adobe investments. The new practice will be presented at Adobe's Summit in April.

feed.title: Kurt Sievers, Retired CEO of NXP Semiconductors, Appointed to Booking Holdings Board
feed.summary: Booking Holdings Inc. announced the appointment of Kurt Sievers, former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its Board of Directors. Sievers brings extensive global experience in technology, mobility, and consumer markets, having led major initiatives at NXP including key acquisitions and mergers. Concurrently, Lynn Radakovich will retire from the Booking Holdings Board at the upcoming Annual Meeting in June.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Solutions stock hits 52-week low at 156.77 USD
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of 156.66 USD, marking a 32.45% decline over the past year. Despite this, InvestingPro data suggests the stock may be undervalued and highlights that the company has raised its dividend for 19 consecutive years. Recent news includes an acquisition to enhance trading technology and analyst ratings adjustments, with several firms maintaining Buy or Outperform ratings despite lower price targets.

feed.title: Form FWP CITIGROUP INC Filed by: CITIGROUP INC
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., has filed a Form FWP for 5 Year Autocallable Market-Linked Securities tied to the Citi Dynamic Asset Selector 5 Excess Return Index (CIISDA5N). These securities offer a 100.00% upside participation rate and an automatic early redemption feature with a premium of at least 6.25% per annum, subject to the index meeting certain levels. The filing details the product's terms, hypothetical scenarios, underlying index methodology, and specific risk considerations, including credit risk and the volatility of the index.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Moderna to $48 From $25, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has significantly increased its price target for Moderna (MRNA) to $48 from $25, while retaining an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent news and analyst activity surrounding the biotechnology company. Moderna specializes in developing therapeutics and vaccines for various diseases including cancer, infectious, autoimmune, and cardiovascular conditions.

feed.title: New CEO Shelves Breakup — Is Kraft Heinz Finally a Turnaround Stock Worth Owning?
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz's new CEO, Steve Cahillane, has abandoned plans to break up the company, opting instead to invest $600 million into the core business. This decision aligns with Warren Buffett's earlier opposition to a split and positions Kraft Heinz to stabilize volumes amid challenges like GLP-1 drugs and private label competition. Despite a GAAP net loss, the company generated strong free cash flow and offers an attractive dividend yield, making it a potential turnaround stock.

feed.title: CoStar Group stock hits 52-week low at $39.10
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $39.10, representing a 50% decrease over the past year. Despite the significant downturn, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with the company holding more cash than debt and expecting net income growth. Recent developments include an expansion of Homes.com, a significant share purchase by the CEO, and board appointment, alongside criticism regarding reduced financial transparency.

feed.title: BiomX Takes Option to Acquire DR. Frucht Systems With $5M Note, Equity and Warrants
feed.summary: BiomX has entered into an exclusive agreement to acquire DR. Frucht Systems, contingent on Mandragola first acquiring a majority stake and obtaining Israeli regulatory approval. The consideration includes cash, a convertible note, Series D preferred shares, pre-funded warrants, and five-year warrants, with share issuances requiring stockholder approval. An earnout clause and a post-closing credit line also form part of the agreement, signaling BiomX's entry into the LADAR-based security and counter-UAS market.

feed.title: Hasbro investigates cybersecurity incident, takes some systems offline
feed.summary: Hasbro is currently investigating a cybersecurity incident that led to some of its systems being taken offline. The company has engaged with law enforcement and third-party cybersecurity experts to address the breach. While specific details about the nature and impact of the incident are not yet fully disclosed, Hasbro is working to restore affected systems and ensure the security of its operations.

feed.title: MKTX Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Marketaxess Holdings Inc.'s (MKTX) financial performance, focusing on its profitability margins and efficiency. It details MKTX's gross margin of 80.34%, operating margin of 37.01%, net margin of 44.98%, and highlights its Return on Equity (ROE) of 19.46%. The analysis also includes a comparison of MKTX's gross margin with competitors SNEX (2.37%) and PIPR (99.86%), placing its market capitalization at $5.86 billion within the sector.

feed.title: Aflac Signs First External Reinsurance Deal With Japan Post Insurance
feed.summary: Aflac's subsidiary, Aflac Re Bermuda Ltd., has finalized its first external reinsurance deal with Japan Post Insurance, covering a block of whole-life annuity policies. This strategic move, effective March 31, 2026, aims to enhance Aflac's capital efficiency, diversify revenue streams, and expand its presence in third-party reinsurance. Japan Post Insurance will continue to manage the policies, while Aflac Re assumes a portion of the risk.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lowers Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) Price Target to $26.00
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reduced its price target for Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) from $28.00 to $26.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating, suggesting a 5.49% potential upside from the current share price. This adjustment comes despite Invesco recently beating quarterly earnings estimates with $0.62 EPS on revenue of $1.26 billion. The consensus among analysts remains a "Hold" with an average target of $28.25, although some firms like Deutsche Bank, Argus, and JPMorgan have issued higher price targets for Invesco in recent months.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc Stock (C) Opened Up by 7.41% on Apr 1: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. (C) shares surged 7.41% on April 1, driven by positive analyst upgrades, significant institutional buying, and progress in resolving regulatory issues. The company's finalized exit from Russia and strong Q4 earnings, along with optimistic future guidance, further boosted investor confidence. Despite a "neutral" MACD and RSI, the stock's fundamentals, including $81.18B in annual revenue, indicate strong performance within the Banking & Investment Services sector.

feed.title: BiomX (PHGE) gets exclusive option on DFSL LADAR security business
feed.summary: BiomX Inc. has secured an exclusive and irrevocable option to acquire 100% of Mandragola Ltd.’s shareholdings in DR. Frucht Systems Ltd. (DFSL), an Israeli LADAR-based security and anti-drone technology company. This acquisition is contingent upon Mandragola first purchasing 60% of DFSL’s share capital and receiving approval from the Israel Innovation Authority. The agreement includes a potential earn-out bonus for Mandragola, tied to DFSL's future revenue performance starting from fiscal year 2027, and a commitment from Mandragola to provide a credit line for DFSL's growth and debt payments.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc Stock (AMAT) Opened Up by 6.74% on Apr 1: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc (AMAT) stock rose by 6.74% on April 1st, driven by strong financial performance, optimistic future guidance, and increasing demand from the AI sector. The company surpassed earnings expectations, provided a strong forecast, and settled a regulatory investigation, all contributing to increased investor confidence and positive analyst sentiment despite noting some competitive and valuation risks.

feed.title: Omnicom's Transformation Consultancy Strengthens Capabilities with the Launch of Unified Adobe Practice
feed.summary: Omnicom, through its transformation consultancy Credera, has launched a unified Adobe practice by integrating LeapPoint, which Omnicom acquired in 2024. This move strengthens Omnicom's position in enterprise marketing transformation by combining Credera's consulting expertise with LeapPoint's award-winning Adobe capabilities. The new practice aims to accelerate growth opportunities for clients by optimizing their Adobe investments and leveraging Omnicom's interconnected services.

feed.title: Japan Post Holdings sells Aflac shares worth $1.59 million By Investing.com
feed.summary: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd., a ten percent owner of AFLAC INC (NYSE:AFL), sold 14,700 shares of common stock on March 30, 2026, for approximately $1.59 million. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 filing with the SEC. Following the sale, Japan Post Holdings still indirectly owns over 51 million shares of Aflac, while analysts like Mizuho have recently adjusted price targets and maintained an "Underperform" rating on Aflac's stock.

feed.title: Plug Power Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Pending: Contact Levi & Korsinsky Before April 3, 2026 to Discuss Your Rights - PLUG
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has announced a class action securities lawsuit against Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG). The lawsuit alleges that Plug Power made false and misleading statements between January 17, 2025, and November 13, 2025, regarding the likelihood of receiving funds from a U.S. Department of Energy loan and the company's hydrogen production facility plans. Investors who suffered losses during this period have until April 3, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Penguin Solutions Completes Strategic Exit from Brazilian Operations
feed.summary: Penguin Solutions has completed its strategic exit from Brazilian operations by selling its remaining 19% stake in Zilia Technologies for $46.08 million to Lexar Europe B.V. This divestiture streamlines Penguin Solutions’ portfolio, allowing it to focus on its core AI platform, memory, and LED solutions, moving away from lower-margin regional memory manufacturing. The company's stock (PENG) currently holds a Neutral score according to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, due to a mix of improving fundamentals, strong free cash flow, significant leverage, and high P/E.

feed.title: CarMax Recognized as One of the 100 Best Companies to Work For® for the 22nd Consecutive Year
feed.summary: CarMax has been honored by Fortune and Great Place to Work® as one of the 100 Best Companies to Work For® for the 22nd consecutive year, ranking #56 in 2026. This recognition highlights CarMax's strong workplace culture, built on trust and support among its associates, and its commitment to employee satisfaction. The company also received accolades as one of the "Best Workplaces in Retail" and for "Parents," and is actively hiring for various roles.

feed.title: From 5 employers to 600: Progyny marks 10 years in family care
feed.summary: Progyny is celebrating its 10-year anniversary, highlighting its growth from 5 founding employers to over 600, covering 7.2 million lives globally. The company emphasizes its significant impact on women's health and family building, including 12% higher pregnancy rates per IVF transfer and 23% higher live birth rates compared to national averages. Progyny plans year-long initiatives to mark the milestone, including partnering with RESOLVE for National Infertility Awareness Week and participating in the NASDAQ Closing Bell Ceremony.
